description.en: The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars. A clean-room Python and Rust rewrite of Claude Code's agent harness architecture, built from scratch without copying proprietary code. Features multi-agent orchestration, tool-calling, and terminal-native AI development.
description.zh: GitHub 历史上最快突破 10 万星的项目。采用 Python 和 Rust 从零重构 Claude Code 代理架构，未经授权复制任何专有代码。具有多代理编排、工具调用和终端原生 AI 开发功能。

description.en: An autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. Shannon analyzes source code, identifies attack vectors, and executes real exploits to prove vulnerabilities before they reach production. Achieved 96.15% success rate on the hint-free XBOW benchmark.
description.zh: 一款自主性白盒 AI 渗透测试工具，用于 Web 应用和 API。Shannon 分析源代码、识别攻击向量并执行真实漏洞利用，在上线前证明安全问题。在无提示 XBOW 基准测试中达到 96.15% 成功率。

description.en: Google DeepMind's most capable open model family to date. Built from the same research as Gemini 3, Gemma 4 comes in four sizes (2B to 31B) and is purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows. Released under Apache 2.0 license.
description.zh: Google DeepMind 至今最强大的开源模型系列。基于 Gemini 3 同等研究构建，Gemma 4 提供四种规格（2B 到 31B），专为高级推理和代理工作流而构建。采用 Apache 2.0 许可证开源。

title.en: Claude Mythos 5: Anthropic's 10-Trillion-Parameter Model Confirmed After Leak
title.zh: Claude Mythos 5：泄露事件后确认 Anthropic 打造万亿参数模型

description.en: A Fortune report revealed on March 26 that Anthropic accidentally exposed details of an unreleased model via a misconfigured CMS. Claude Mythos is estimated at 10 trillion parameters and described as posing 'unprecedented cybersecurity risks.' Anthropic confirmed the model's existence, calling it a 'step change' in capabilities. Prediction markets put the odds of a public launch at ~73% by June 2026.
description.zh: 3 月 26 日 Fortune 报道称，Anthropic 因内容管理系统配置错误意外暴露了未发布模型的细节。Claude Mythos 估计拥有 10 万亿参数，被描述为具有「史无前例的网络安全风险」。Anthropic 已确认模型存在，称其为能力的「阶跃变化」。预测市场预计 2026 年 6 月前公开发布的概率约为 73%。

title.en: OpenAI Acquires TBPN Podcast for Undisclosed Sum
title.zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN 播客，具体金额未披露

description.en: OpenAI acquired TBPN (Technology Business Programming Network), a popular tech industry talk show hosted by John Coogan and Jordi Hays, in its first media acquisition. The show will maintain editorial independence while OpenAI gains a direct channel to influence tech business narratives. Co-hosts will join OpenAI as part of the deal.
description.zh: OpenAI 收购了 TBPN（Technology Business Programming Network），这是一个由 John Coogan 和 Jordi Hays 主持的热门科技商业节目，这是 OpenAI 首次媒体收购。该节目将保持编辑独立性，而 OpenAI 获得了影响科技商业叙事直接渠道。联合主持人将作为交易的一部分加入 OpenAI。

title.en: SpaceX Acquires xAI for $250 Billion in Landmark AI Consolidation
title.zh: SpaceX 以 2500 亿美元收购 xAI，AI 行业里程碑式整合

description.en: SpaceX completed the acquisition of xAI for $250 billion, creating one of the largest AI conglomerates in history. The deal combines xAI's Grok 4.20 model (78% non-hallucination rate) with SpaceX's infrastructure. Q1 2026 saw a record $267.2 billion in AI venture funding, dominated by OpenAI, Anthropic, and this landmark merger.
description.zh: SpaceX 以 2500 亿美元完成对 xAI 的收购，创建了史上最大的 AI 集团之一。该交易将 xAI 的 Grok 4.20 模型（78% 非幻觉率）与 SpaceX 的基础设施相结合。2026 年第一季度 AI 风险投资创纪录达到 2672 亿美元，主要由 OpenAI、Anthropic 和这一里程碑式合并主导。

title.en: Google Releases Gemma 4: Four Open Models Ranked #3 and #6 on Arena AI Leaderboard
title.zh: Google 发布 Gemma 4：四款开源模型位居 Arena AI 排行榜第 3 和第 6 位

description.en: Google unveiled Gemma 4, its most intelligent open model family, built from Gemini 3 research. The 31B model ranks #3 globally on Arena AI's open leaderboard while the 26B MoE model ranks #6 — outperforming models 20x their size. Released under Apache 2.0 license with four sizes from 2B to 31B, purpose-built for agentic workflows.
description.zh: Google 发布 Gemma 4，这是其最智能的开源模型系列，基于 Gemini 3 研究构建。31B 模型在全球 Arena AI 开源排行榜排名第 3，26B MoE 模型排名第 6——超越了体型大 20 倍的模型。采用 Apache 2.0 许可证，提供 2B 到 31B 四种规格，专为代理工作流构建。

title.en: Google's TurboQuant Cuts AI Memory Requirements by 6x at ICLR 2026
title.zh: Google TurboQuant 在 ICLR 2026 将 AI 内存需求降低 6 倍

description.en: Google research introduced TurboQuant at ICLR 2026, a two-step quantization algorithm combining PolarQuant (random vector rotation) and Quantized Johnson-Lindenstrauss (QJL) to address the KV cache memory bottleneck. This breakthrough could cut GPU memory requirements by a factor of six, potentially transforming the economics of AI inference at scale.
description.zh: Google 研究团队在 ICLR 2026 上推出 TurboQuant，这是一种结合 PolarQuant（随机向量旋转）和量化 Johnson-Lindenstrauss（QJL）的两步量化算法，用于解决 KV 缓存内存瓶颈。这一突破可将 GPU 内存需求降低 6 倍，可能改变大规模 AI 推理的经济效益。

title.en: Over 50% of US Adults Believe AI Will Likely Cause Them Harm — Quinnipiac Poll
title.zh: 超过 50% 美国成年人认为 AI 可能对他们造成伤害——昆尼皮亚克民调

description.en: A new Quinnipiac poll reveals that more than half of U.S. adults believe AI is likely to cause them personal harm, reflecting growing public apprehension about job displacement, privacy violations, and the societal implications of advanced AI. The poll signals increasing pressure on AI companies to demonstrate responsible development practices.
description.zh: 一项新的昆尼皮亚克民调显示，超过一半的美国成年人认为 AI 可能对他们造成个人伤害，反映出公众对失业、隐私侵犯和先进 AI 社会影响日益增长的担忧。该民调表明，AI 公司面临越来越大的压力，需要展示负责任的开发实践。

title.en: MLPerf Inference v6.0 Released with Record 24 Organizations, Five New Processors
title.zh: MLPerf Inference v6.0 发布，24 家组织创纪录，五款新处理器亮相

description.en: MLCommons released MLPerf Inference v6.0 with record participation: 24 organizations submitted results across five newly available processors. The benchmark introduces five new models and one updated model for lower latency scenarios. This marks the first major benchmark release of 2026, with MLCommons highlighting the tremendous velocity of AI progress.
description.zh: MLCommons 发布 MLPerf Inference v6.0，创纪录有 24 家组织提交结果，覆盖五款新处理器。该基准测试引入五款新模型和一款更新模型以降低延迟场景。这是 2026 年首个主要基准测试发布，MLCommons 强调 AI 进展的惊人速度。

insight_analysis.en: April 2026 is reshaping the AI landscape through consolidation, leakage, and open-source competition. The week's defining narrative is the Claude Mythos leak — a 10-trillion-parameter model that Anthropic itself warned poses 'unprecedented cybersecurity risks.' This marks a shift from capability concerns to national security-level threat assessment of frontier AI. Meanwhile, SpaceX's $250B acquisition of xAI creates a vertically integrated AI aerospace powerhouse, signaling that AI is now a core strategic asset in national technological competition. On the open-source front, Claw Code's explosive 100K+ star trajectory (reached in hours) demonstrates that the developer community will rapidly replicate and improve upon any leaked architecture — the 'harness layer' is now as contested as model weights. Google's Gemma 4 launch under Apache 2.0 appears partly strategic: maintain open-weights relevance against Chinese competitors like DeepSeek while anchoring the Gemma ecosystem (400M+ downloads, 100K+ variants). The efficiency frontier is equally active — Google's TurboQuant promises 6x memory reduction, while MLPerf v6.0 shows the benchmark wars are intensifying. For practitioners, the key takeaways: (1) AI security is now a board-level concern, (2) open harness frameworks are democratizing agentic AI development, and (3) model efficiency breakthroughs will make edge deployment increasingly viable.
insight_analysis.zh: 2026 年 4 月正在通过整合、泄露和开源竞争重塑 AI 领域。本周的核心叙事是 Claude Mythos 泄露——Anthropic 自身警告这个 10 万亿参数模型具有「史无前例的网络安全风险」。这标志着从能力担忧转向对前沿 AI 的国家安全级别威胁评估。与此同时，SpaceX 以 2500 亿美元收购 xAI 创建了垂直整合的 AI 航空航天巨头，表明 AI 现已成为国家技术竞争的核心战略资产。在开源方面，Claw Code 的爆炸性 10 万+星轨迹（在数小时内达成）表明开发者社区将快速复制和改进任何泄露的架构——「控制层」现在与模型权重同样具有争夺价值。Google 在 Apache 2.0 下发布 Gemma 4 似乎具有战略意义：在面对 DeepSeek 等中国竞争者时保持开源权重的重要性，同时巩固 Gemma 生态系统（4 亿+下载量、10 万+变体）。效率前沿同样活跃——Google 的 TurboQuant 承诺降低 6 倍内存需求，而 MLPerf v6.0 显示基准测试战争正在加剧。对从业者而言，关键要点是：(1) AI 安全现在是董事会级别议题，(2) 开源控制框架正在使代理 AI 开发民主化，(3) 模型效率突破将使边缘部署越来越可行。
